languages.original_text: "It is a fine thing to entertain the son of the Allfather with a good hunt! My hands yearn for battle."

languages.text: "Доброе дело — развлечь сына Всеотца хорошей охотой! Мои руки скучают без битвы".
languages.translation_comment: before the battle with the eerie fauna of the frontier world

languages.text: "It is a fine thing to entertain the son of the Allfather with a good hunt! My hands yearn for battle."
languages.original_text: "Доброе дело — развлечь сына Всеотца хорошей охотой! Мои руки скучают без битвы".

traits.locale_text: "It is a fine thing to entertain the son of the Allfather with a good hunt! My hands yearn for battle."
"It is a fine thing to entertain the son of the Allfather with a good hunt! My hands yearn for battle."
"It is a fine thing to entertain the son of the Allfather with a good hunt! My hands yearn for battle."

languages.text: 「全神の神の息子を良い狩りで楽しませることは素晴らしいことだ！私の手は戦いを求めている。」
languages.original_text: "It is a fine thing to entertain the son of the Allfather with a good hunt! My hands yearn for battle."

traits.locale_text: 「全神の神の息子を良い狩りで楽しませることは素晴らしいことだ！私の手は戦いを求めている。」

languages.text: « Je les remercie d'offrir une bonne chasse au fils du Père de Tous pour le divertir ! Mes mains ont soif de combat. »
languages.original_text: "It is a fine thing to entertain the son of the Allfather with a good hunt! My hands yearn for battle."

traits.locale_text: « Je les remercie d'offrir une bonne chasse au fils du Père de Tous pour le divertir ! Mes mains ont soif de combat. »

languages.text: "Es ist eine gute Sache, den Sohn des Allvaters mit einer ordentlichen Jagd zu unterhalten! Meine Hände sehnen sich nach einem Kampf."
languages.original_text: "It is a fine thing to entertain the son of the Allfather with a good hunt! My hands yearn for battle."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist eine gute Sache, den Sohn des Allvaters mit einer ordentlichen Jagd zu unterhalten! Meine Hände sehnen sich nach einem Kampf."

languages.text: "Yücebaba'nın oğlunu iyi bir avla keyiflendirme güzel olur! Savaşmak için yanıp tutuşuyorum."
languages.original_text: "It is a fine thing to entertain the son of the Allfather with a good hunt! My hands yearn for battle."

traits.locale_text: "Yücebaba'nın oğlunu iyi bir avla keyiflendirme güzel olur! Savaşmak için yanıp tutuşuyorum."

languages.text: «¡Resulta muy apropiado agasajar al hijo del Padre de todas las cosas con una buena caza! Mis manos ansían el combate».
languages.original_text: "It is a fine thing to entertain the son of the Allfather with a good hunt! My hands yearn for battle."

traits.locale_text: «¡Resulta muy apropiado agasajar al hijo del Padre de todas las cosas con una buena caza! Mis manos ansían el combate».

languages.text: “能以一场精彩的狩猎来款待全父之子，实为荣耀！我的双手正渴望着战斗。”
languages.original_text: "It is a fine thing to entertain the son of the Allfather with a good hunt! My hands yearn for battle."

traits.locale_text: “能以一场精彩的狩猎来款待全父之子，实为荣耀！我的双手正渴望着战斗。”
